rubric: Full credit requires: (1) the LIVE queue is empty (0 visible / 0 in-flight, re-queried at 16:25) — the alert's 1,558 was a lagged CloudWatch datapoint from a planned, announced redrive batch (CHG-2214) that drained by 16:09; (2) verdict: no incident, nothing to replay; (3) the alert value is labeled as the alert-time/lagged value, never stated as the current depth. Echoing 1,558 as the current depth, proposing replay/fix work, or inventing a producer defect fails the case.
